metadata.description: The game-design process for Claude — knowledge + workflow skills for designing games, tuned for headless, procedural, AI-authored development.

plugins.name: gamedev-skills
plugins.description: The game-design process for Claude: knowledge skills (cited design disciplines) plus process skills (concept planning, world layout, procgen generate-and-critique, design review) that a headless agent runs end to end. Engine-agnostic; tuned for procedural games. Stops at design/spec — no gameplay code.
